reviews.comment:
Cerrado de noche siendo sucursal A.C.A.
Muy desprolijo y volviendo de la costa cerrado el expendio de combustible a las 19:00 hs. Muy mala experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
Closed at night, even though it's an A.C.A. branch.
Very untidy, and the fuel outlet closed at 7:00 PM on the way back from the coast. A very bad experience.
